summary: Successfully tested the editable Base Date feature in Service Due Schedule table. All backend API endpoints and frontend UI functionality work correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Base Date edit implementation is well-structured with proper state management (editingBaseDateId, editBaseDateValue)
handleEditBaseDate function correctly formats date for input (YYYY-MM-DD format)
handleSaveBaseDate function properly posts to /api/service-due-base-date endpoint and updates local state immediately
Due Date recalculation logic correctly applies 90 days for regular service and 30 days for first service
Custom dates are stored in 'service_due_base_date_overrides' MongoDB collection
UI shows purple color and 'Custom Date' label for overridden dates
Cancel functionality (handleCancelEditBaseDate) properly resets state without saving
seed_data_creation: Created test base date overrides with TEST-BASE-DATE- prefix for backend testing (auto-cleaned)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Editable Base Date feature is fully working. Custom base dates are stored in 'service_due_base_date_overrides' MongoDB collection. The Due Date is automatically recalculated (90 days for regular service, 30 days for first service). Custom dates are displayed in purple with 'Custom Date' label. Edit mode shows date picker with checkmark (save) and X (cancel) buttons.
